# Arc framing — <arc name>

> Async pre-read before an arc starts. Replaces the planning meeting.
> Comment with questions, concerns, or proposed changes to the frame.
> The arc starts when the frame is committed (issue created from this discussion).

---

**Comment template (for engineers reading this):**

- What about the frame is unclear?
- Is anything missing from out-of-scope that should be?
- Is the session order right? Any sequencing concerns?
- Are there sessions you would add, remove, or merge?

The discussion closes when the frame is sharp enough to convert into a tracked arc issue.
